## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or research extension
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Reproducibility or testing improvement
- [ ] Dependency or maintenance update

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `pytest` locally.
- [ ] I tested the relevant example or experiment command.
- [ ] I documented any solver, dataset or platform limitations.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behaviour changed.

## Research and data integrity

- [ ] Any dataset used can legally be redistributed.
- [ ] Data provenance and licence are documented.
- [ ] Synthetic, reconstructed and original data are clearly distinguished.
- [ ] I state whether results reproduce the paper or extend it.

## Results

Provide commands, key outputs and any differences from the published paper.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated edits.
- [ ] Documentation and citation metadata remain accurate.
- [ ] No credentials, private data or commercial licence files are included.
